title: Gnosticism and Dualism in the Early Fiction of Philip K. Dick
author: Lorenzo DiTommaso
card_summary: A scholarly article from Science Fiction Studies examining the Gnostic and dualistic themes in Philip K. Dick's early fiction. DiTommaso traces Dick's engagement with Gnostic cosmology and the persistent dualism between authentic and counterfeit reality that would become central to his mature work.
works_discussed: The Three Stigmata of Palmer Eldritch
